notes: Background-audio fix: Android Chrome was issuing a Media Session 'pause' action the instant the PWA went to background, and our handler was honoring it. The pause handler is now conditional — pauses received within 1.8s of a visibility-to-hidden change are treated as OS-induced and ignored (audio keeps playing); pauses after the grace window are treated as genuine user actions (lockscreen tap, headphone button) and honored. Also: mediaSession.playbackState is now set to 'playing' synchronously before every audioEl.play(), and re-asserted on every visibility flip while audio is playing, so the OS can't claim it didn't know we were active media.
